title: 企業テックブログRSS
description: 企業のテックブログの更新をまとめたRSSフィード

items.content_html: Jul 18, 22:27 UTC Resolved - Tableau Engineers detected a degradation within Tableau Public which caused extract refreshes to begin failing on Jul 15, 2022 | 10:53 am PT. Engineers have mitigated the issue and extracts are updating as expected. This incident is now considered resolved as of Jul 18, 2022 | 1:45 pm PT.

items.content_html: Jul 18, 17:28 UTC Resolved - On Wednesday, July 13th, 2022 scheduled bridge extracts for datasources published before mid-2020 and using legacy schedules began failing. Tableau engineers implemented a solution over the weekend which mitigated this issue for all Tableau Online pods. This solution has been verified and this incident is now considered resolved.
